exort.message.debug_load_hints: Syntetiske benchmarkråd: dominerande %1$s; CPU %2$s%%, WIRE %3$s%%, DISPLAYS %4$s%%, DB %5$s%%, WIRELESS %6$s%%, GUARDS %7$s%%, WORLD %8$s%% (placements %9$s).
